opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest got incredibly tight, my calves started burning, and I completely lost my erection and could not get it back.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened tonight when my partner and I were trying to have sex — my chest went really tight, my legs cramped up, and everything just shut down. I got scared I was having a heart attack.

symptom_narrative.onset: The erection problems have crept up slowly over about the past year; tonight's chest tightness and leg cramping came on suddenly during sex.
symptom_narrative.duration: About a year for the erection trouble; tonight's chest and leg symptoms lasted a few minutes.
symptom_narrative.character: Chest felt tight and heavy; calves burned and cramped; couldn't get a firm erection at all and it went completely soft.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The chest tightness frightened me — it felt serious. The erection problem has been really upsetting and is straining my relationship.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Tightness across the chest, burning cramp in both calves, and the erection itself.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: The chest and leg symptoms only came on with the physical effort of sex and eased off once I stopped and rested.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Stopping and sitting down for about five minutes settled the chest tightness and the leg cramps.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: The physical exertion of sex brought it all on.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I went sweaty and clammy and felt really anxious. No firm morning erections for a long time now either.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I haven't had chest tightness like this before, but the erections have been getting weaker and weaker over the year.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've stopped attempting sex because of the failures, and it's causing a lot of strain between us.

past_medical_history.how_managed: I was given blood pressure tablets but I stopped taking them a few months ago.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I carry a lot of weight around my middle

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I don't really exercise, and I snack a lot on salty things.
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: The erection problems have put a real strain on my relationship with my partner.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from memory / home scales, not measured this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: looks sweaty and clammy, sitting in a chair looking distressed and frightened
partner says he went pale and sweaty during the episode and was frightened he was having a heart attack
